snippet.title: 100,000 UC PYROTECHNIC CHROMA AMR OPENING 🔝 | JONATHAN IS BACK!!🖤 | BGMI!
snippet.description:
OnePlus Nord CE6 Lite launching on the 7th May! 

Click to stay notified - https://www.amazon.in/b?node=217694012031
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆


 Follow Me & Stay Connected! 
📷 Instagram - @ig_jonathangaming
💬 Discord - https://discord.gg/jonathan

snippet.title: 🔴 [HINDI] TEZ FFMIC 2026 Spring | Grand Finals - Champion Rush
snippet.description:
12 Teams. One Champion 🏆
Welcome to the TEZ FFMIC 2026 Spring GRAND FINALS!
📍 Live from Mahatma Mandir Convention & Exhibition Centre, Gandhinagar
Day 2: First team to 80 points activates Champion Rush! Any team who wins a Booyah! after activating Champion Rush will become CHAMPIONS of TEZ FFMIC 2026 Spring

Fighting their way through the Group and Knockout Stages, these are 12 teams that have made it to the GRAND FINALS:
- GODS REIGN PROS
- IQOO TOTAL GAMING
- IQOO OGXTSG
- GODLIKE ESPORTS
- AEROBOTZ ESPORTS
- REVENANT XSPARK
- TEAM HIND
- RNX ESPORTS
- RECKONING ESPORTS
- GG INSTINCT
- GYAN GAMING
- FIREEYES GAMING

🗓️ Grand Finals Schedule:
Day 1 - Point Rush 📅 April 25 | 🕑 2:00 PM IST onwards
Day 2 - CHAMPION RUSH 📅 April 26 | 🕑 2:00 PM IST onwards

Are you ready to FEEL THE FIRE? 🔥

#FFMIC2026 #FreeFire #FreeFireMAX #TEZ #FFMIC #FeelTheFire

If you love high-speed races, smooth driving, and relaxed gaming streams, you’re in the right place. Join the live chat, suggest races, and enjoy nonstop GTA 5 fun with laid-back vibes. This stream is all about speed, style, and chilling with the community. Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and share the stream to support the channel and be part of the GTA V family.#gta6 

  #gtav #gta5 #trolling #gaming

snippet.title: Kya Mausum Aaya Hai | Anari Movie Song | Udit Narayan, Sadhana Sargam | Hindi Gana
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song Name : Kya Mausam Aaya Hai
Singer : Sadhana Sargam, Udit Narayan
Music Director: Anand Shrivastav, Milind Shrivastav
Lyrics by: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Director:  K. Muralimohana Rao
Star Cast: Karishma Kapoor, Venkatesh, Suresh Oberoi

Lyrics : 
Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Mehalon ki rani
Dukh se begani
Lag jaye na dhoop tujhe
Ud ud jau
Sabko bataon
Dhoop lage hai chao mein mujhe

Mehalon ki rani
Dukh se begani
Lag jaye na dhoop tujhe
Ud ud jau
Sabko bataon
Dhoop lage hai chao mein mujhe

Kaaton se ho jaye paon na ghayal
Kaaton pe naachungi bandh ke mein payal
Ghar nahi yeh to
Kutiya humari hai

Yeh teri kutiya to mehalo se pyaari hai

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Behti pawan ki
Ujaale gagan ki
Jee karta hai saath chalu

Cheekne dagar hai
Geer ne ka daar hai
Tham ka tera haath chalu

Behti pawan ki
Ujaale gagan ki
Jee karta hai saath chalu

Cheekne dagar hai
Geer ne ka daar hai
Tham ka tera haath chalu

Dharti pe bekhren hai
Oos ke moti

Yeh teri boli to
Sur naye peeroti

Dard ka woh agan

Mein chod ke aaye
Kya tujhe jaannat ki raunka nahi bhai

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai.

#karishmakapoor #venkatesh  #uditnarayan #sadhnasargam #KyaMausamAayaHai #bollywoodsongs #hindisong #romanticsongs

Get ready to vibe with the power-packed remix of “Kochu Kunjinte Achan Oru” from Vaazha 2! 💥.
Lyrics Written by Kalabhavan Mani, Music Composed by Sidhartha Vijayan and Sung by Kalabhavan Mani.

snippet.title: JETLEE Trailer | Satya | Ritesh Rana | Rhea Singha | Vennela Kishore | Kaala Bhairava
snippet.description:
Okati gurthupettukondi...
OKATI. MAY OKATI 😎

JetLee Trailer out now 💥💥

#JETLEE ready for takeoff in cinemas worldwide from May 1st 💥

Cast: Satya, Rhea Singha, Vennela Kishore, Ajay and others.

#JetleeTrailer #Satya #RheaSingha #VennelaKishore #RiteshRana #KaalaBhairava #ClapEntertainment #MythriMovieMakers

Crew :
Directed by Ritesh Rana
Produced by Clap Entertainment (Chiranjeevi (Cherry) and Hemalatha Pedamallu)
Presented by Mythri Movie Makers (Naveen Yerneni and Ravi Shankar Yalamanchili)

snippet.title: Tujh sang preet lagai sajana💖 तुझ संग प्रीत लगाई सजना Hindi new song #darad​ bhara geet wed #song​
snippet.description:
💖 Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna | Heart Touching Romantic Song 2026 💖

Is khoobsurat gaane “Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna” mein mehsoos karein sacche pyaar ki gehraai ❤️ Yeh hindi song har us dil ke liye hai jise kabhi kisi se sachcha pyaar hua ho… chahe wo milan ho ya judai 💔

🎶 Soft music, emotional lyrics aur soulful vibes ke saath yeh romantic song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jayega. Jaise ek moonlight night mein ek lantern chamakta hai, waise hi yeh love story aapke dil ko roshan karegi.
Tujh sang preet lagai sajana 🎶💖 तुझ संग प्रीत लगाई बालमा Hindi new song #darad​ bhara geet wed #song​

snippet.title: Sapne Vs Everyone Season 2 - Official Trailer | Ambrish Verma, Paramvir Singh Cheema, Vijayant Kohli
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Sapne Vs Everyone Season 2 Official Trailer 
Starring Ambrish Verma, Paramvir Singh Cheema, Vijayant Kohli, Abhishek Chauhan, Nidhi Shah, Khushali Kumar, Naveen Kasturia, Vaishak Shankar
Directed by Ambrish Verma
Written by Ambrish Verma
Production Company: The Viral Fever

Official Release Date - May 1, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Two men chase their dreams in different worlds: Prashant battles Mumbai’s ruthless film industry to build his career, while Jimmy, a real estate salesman known as the “Sales God,” will stop at nothing to take revenge on his Mama as both question whether destiny is decided by fate or by those bold enough to take control of it.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Siftaan : Amrit Maan | Tania | Neeru Bajwa | Jasmeen Akhtar | Jawaak | New Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records brings you ‘Siftaan’, a vibrant new Punjabi song by Amrit Maan and Jasmeen Akhtar, straight from the much-awaited Punjabi movie Jawaak. Packed with energetic beats, catchy lyrics, and a festive vibe, this track is tailor-made for wedding celebrations, sangeet nights, and full-on party scenes.

If you’re looking for the latest Punjabi wedding song that instantly lifts the mood, Siftaan hits the mark. Amrit Maan’s signature style blends perfectly with Jasmeen Akhtar’s powerful vocals, creating a track that feels both fresh and rooted in Punjabi music.

From Punjabi dance songs for weddings to trending Punjabi party songs, Siftaan fits effortlessly into every high-energy playlist. Whether you’re making Instagram reels, or just want a song to vibe to with friends, this one has replay value written all over it. Check out the song now!!!

#Siftaan #AmritMaan #NewPunjabiSong #PunjabiMovieSong #JawaakSong #PunjabiMusic 

Streaming Links :
Insta https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1635080447704083
Spotify https://open.spotify.com/track/1lD4Yc0VC0F258VbAWED72
Amazon Music https://music.amazon.in/tracks/B0GYLG9SXY

en.description:
Speed Records brings you ‘Siftaan’, a vibrant new Punjabi song by Amrit Maan and Jasmeen Akhtar, straight from the much-awaited Punjabi movie Jawaak. Packed with energetic beats, catchy lyrics, and a festive vibe, this track is tailor-made for wedding celebrations, sangeet nights, and full-on party scenes.

If you’re looking for the latest Punjabi wedding song that instantly lifts the mood, Siftaan hits the mark. Amrit Maan’s signature style blends perfectly with Jasmeen Akhtar’s powerful vocals, creating a track that feels both fresh and rooted in Punjabi music.

From Punjabi dance songs for weddings to trending Punjabi party songs, Siftaan fits effortlessly into every high-energy playlist. Whether you’re making Instagram reels, or just want a song to vibe to with friends, this one has replay value written all over it. Check out the song now!!!

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Hentok Konyak - Nyu Wan Wao (Official Music Video) @Aphewangsa
snippet.description:
My First Original Song — A Tribute to My Mother

This debut original composition is a deeply personal tribute to my mother, whose passing when I was six years old profoundly influenced the course of my life. This piece reflects a journey of love, loss, and resilience, carried forward by her enduring memory.


Written & Composed by: Hentok Konyakhttps://www.instagram.com/hentok_konyak?igsh=ZmNkZ2lrZGozOXY2


Cast:

•Aphe Konyakhttps://www.instagram.com/aphe_cooks_and_vlogs2712?igsh=ams4aXZ5Z2x3M3dh
•Rathai
•Amenla Pongenhttps://www.instagram.com/amen90105?igsh=cmV0bHdjeTE1bW4w


Video Credits:

•Cinematography by Studio LAGOMhttps://www.instagram.com/studiolagom__?igsh=dGV4Y2VnM3o3anZ4
•Directed by Akum Denhttps://www.instagram.com/aakumden?igsh=c3p0ODY0ejVjMTlh
•Viky Meiteihttps://www.instagram.com/vm_videosolution?igsh=MWN6cHJvNW5qdnljdA==
•Manminder Singhhttps://www.instagram.com/manni0.9?igsh=cWV4bTVueno3Z2tl


Script Written by: Chongboi Singsonhttps://www.instagram.com/writes_cb?igsh=aTRwOWQ1eTBqanlw



Lyrics Translated by: Leiwang Thttps://www.instagram.com/_alei_yanlem?igsh=dWZzOXZtczRzY3Fk


Special Thanks:

We extend our sincere gratitude to Mr. & Mrs. Tongnyei Konyak for permitting us to feature their children.


Special thanks to Miss Amenla Pongen & Mrs. Pheying Konyak for coordinating the children for the video cast.


We are also grateful to Mr. & Mrs. Tashi Ozukum for generously providing their home, along with their warm hospitality and invaluable support throughout the production.





LYRICS 

Verse 1
Kahtok nyu me üya tuh shüo 
Hongli mongmei pu yünang pe
Nyem ha me muh khah ha min pha
Puhpu humnung nyu li phei me

Chorus 
Onyu nang e puhpu nang ha tüo 
Nang ngoh pu nyoi te yah tei yah
Nyu wan wao e ü-üyin mükphe shaha
Phei nyih nyu a lin kúm

Verse 2
Shin mang me nge pu te nohoi
Mangmeng üja she ie nang ki
Onyu tüme ame hüo hah
Hüo lak nyoi üte ie tüm pha


Verse 3
Puhpu humnung nyu yünang ma
Noksha phongjong wing e mah nang
Yoi nyu mongmeng ne tah túm hah 
Li phei me yung pu jajang ja

Verse 4
Shaji onyu nang ha tüo a
Nang monghum lak ju ngoi tüki
Nang ha ükem pa yung shon pu
Ngao wing jai ya ken pu onyu..

#mothersday #song #tribute #emotional #song #truestory #hentok #konyak

ಸೋಮವಾರ ವಿಶೇಷ  ಶಿವ ಸ್ತುತಿ | ಲಿಂಗಾಷ್ಟಕಂ - ಬಿಲ್ವಾಷ್ಟಕಂ  - Lord Shiva Bhakthi Songs


#Lingashtakam #Bilwashtakam #Shivashtakam #LordShivaKannadaSongs #ShivaBhajans #BhakthiSongs


Lord shiva songs List on this special Kartika Somavara Songs list
Lingashtakam, Bhramha Murati Surarchita Lingam, 
Bilwashtakam, Tridalam Trigunakaram,
Shivashtakam, Prabhum prananadham,
Vishwanadashtakam, gangataranga ramaniya,  
rudrashtakam, Namamisha,
shiva panchakshara stotram, namashivaya namashivaya, 
chandra Shekarashtakam, chadrashekara chadrashekhara 
dwadasha jyotirlinga stotram  
daridra dahana stotram, vishweshwaraya narakantava karanaya, 
aksharamala stotram, samba sadashiva samba sadashiva,


#ShivaKannadsSongs
#KannadaBhakthiSongs
#BhakthiSongs

snippet.title: Rakesh Barot | Hona No Nagaro- 4K Video - રાકેશ બારોટ | New Gujarati Lagan Geet 2026 | Jhankar Music
snippet.description:
Jhankar Music Gujarati Presents Latest Wedding Special Video Song titled "Hona No Nagaro - હોનાનો નગારો" Sung by Rakesh Barot, & Penned by Naresh Thakor Vayad & Music Composed By Ravi Nagar, Rahul Nadiya, Starring: Rakesh Barot, Meet Rao & Concept. Director by Vishnu Thakor Adalaj
Join this channel :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQeljbfXMX_5a2_KMXTkF-A/join

If you love Gujarati Wedding Songs, this song will touch your heart.

જો તમને ગુજરાતી લગ્ન ગીતો ગમે છે, તો આ ગીત તમારા હૃદયને સ્પર્શી જશે.

🎬 𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐥 𝐕𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐨 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐬

#rakeshbarot #newgujaratisong #lagangeet #jhankarmusicgujarati

♪ 𝐈 𝐓𝐮𝐧𝐞𝐬 : https://surl.li/htsddy

♪ 𝐆𝐚𝐚𝐧𝐚 : https://surl.li/zbnuus

♪ 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐓𝐮𝐛𝐞 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 : https://surl.li/qwyvcg
♪ 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐦 𝐑𝐞𝐞𝐥𝐬 : https://surl.li/qmpxbu
♪ 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 : https://surl.li/htsddy

-------------------------------
📝 𝐋𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐬: Gujarati👇

હો જોન માં હોનાનો નગારો જોન માં રૂપાના નગારો...(૨)
રૂપાશેર દોડી મોણારાજ
હે ઘોડે આજ ચડ્યા છે વીર મારા 
ઊંચા અલબેલા કુંવારા 
ભઈલુ મારો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
હો પીઠી ભર્યા પીળા રે પીતાંબર 
ઝરી ભર્યા સાફે શોભે વર 
હે ટોડલે બોલે મોર મધરાળા 
લાડો આજ લાગેશે રૂપાળા...(૨)
માડી જાયો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
હે ઘર નો મોભી પૈઇણે મોણારાજ

હો ગામના ગોદરે નજરો નોખો ટ્રાફિક થયું જોમ 
વરઘોડા નો વટ જોવા આયુ આખુ ગોમ
હો વીરા મારા બંદૂકે ભડાકા ફૂટે જાજેરીશે જોન 
સીતા ના તોરણે જોને પૈણવા હેડ્યા રોમ
હો પૈઇણે લખપતિ નો લાડ વાગે શરણાઈ શુર તાલ...(૨)
હે વરને લીધી વરના ગાડી લેવા જાવુ નોનચક લાડી...(૨)
વેવાઈ વાળા ગોમ મોણારાજ 
હે લાડી વાળા દેશ મોણારાજ

હે કડકડતી નોટો ઊડે ને રૂપિયો નો વરસાદ
અમેરા અવસર માં કુટુંબ પરિવાર નો સાથ
હો હગા વાલા સેન સંબંધી ના મોઢે એકજ વાત
વિવા જોયા ઘણા પણ આ જોન નો જબરો ઠાઠ
હો પીળા પ્રભાત ની પોર જોન આજ જોડી જાકમ જોળ...(૨)
હે વાયડ ગોમ ના વડલે વાગે વાજા 
ગાડીએ ઓ ઊભાશે વરરાજા 
વાયડ ગોમ ના વડલે વાગે વાજા 
સનરૂફ ગાડીએ ઊભાશે વરરાજા
ભઈલુ મારો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
હે વીરો મારો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
-------------------------------
➤રાકેશ બારોટ ના અન્ય ગીતો નિહાળવા માટે નીચે આપેલી લિંક ક્લિક કરો:👇

♪ 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐦 𝐑𝐞𝐞𝐥𝐬 : https://surl.li/qmpxbu
♪ 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 : https://surl.li/htsddy

-------------------------------
📝 𝐋𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐬: Gujarati👇

હો જોન માં હોનાનો નગારો જોન માં રૂપાના નગારો...(૨)
રૂપાશેર દોડી મોણારાજ
હે ઘોડે આજ ચડ્યા છે વીર મારા 
ઊંચા અલબેલા કુંવારા 
ભઈલુ મારો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
હો પીઠી ભર્યા પીળા રે પીતાંબર 
ઝરી ભર્યા સાફે શોભે વર 
હે ટોડલે બોલે મોર મધરાળા 
લાડો આજ લાગેશે રૂપાળા...(૨)
માડી જાયો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
હે ઘર નો મોભી પૈઇણે મોણારાજ

હો ગામના ગોદરે નજરો નોખો ટ્રાફિક થયું જોમ 
વરઘોડા નો વટ જોવા આયુ આખુ ગોમ
હો વીરા મારા બંદૂકે ભડાકા ફૂટે જાજેરીશે જોન 
સીતા ના તોરણે જોને પૈણવા હેડ્યા રોમ
હો પૈઇણે લખપતિ નો લાડ વાગે શરણાઈ શુર તાલ...(૨)
હે વરને લીધી વરના ગાડી લેવા જાવુ નોનચક લાડી...(૨)
વેવાઈ વાળા ગોમ મોણારાજ 
હે લાડી વાળા દેશ મોણારાજ

હે કડકડતી નોટો ઊડે ને રૂપિયો નો વરસાદ
અમેરા અવસર માં કુટુંબ પરિવાર નો સાથ
હો હગા વાલા સેન સંબંધી ના મોઢે એકજ વાત
વિવા જોયા ઘણા પણ આ જોન નો જબરો ઠાઠ
હો પીળા પ્રભાત ની પોર જોન આજ જોડી જાકમ જોળ...(૨)
હે વાયડ ગોમ ના વડલે વાગે વાજા 
ગાડીએ ઓ ઊભાશે વરરાજા 
વાયડ ગોમ ના વડલે વાગે વાજા 
સનરૂફ ગાડીએ ઊભાશે વરરાજા
ભઈલુ મારો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
હે વીરો મારો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
-------------------------------

snippet.description:
శ్రీశైల మల్లికార్జున స్వామి భక్తి పాటలు 🔱🙏 | Srisailam Mallikarjuna Songs | Shiva Folk SongsTelugu  

Telangana Folk Devotional songs
Lyrics: Maddiveni Srinivas 

Experience the divine power of Sri Srisailam Mallikarjuna Swamy, one of the most sacred forms of Lord Shiva worshipped at Srisailam. These soulful Shiva Folk Songs Telugu and devotional melodies are dedicated to Lord Mallikarjuna, who blesses devotees with peace, protection, and spiritual strength.

Listening to Srisailam Mallikarjuna Songs is believed to remove obstacles, negative energies, and bring harmony, prosperity, and happiness into life. These devotional folk songs beautifully blend tradition and devotion, creating a powerful spiritual experience.

snippet.title: ‘NANG  I  AWM A’ - JONATHAN LIANHNA Ft ZOREMA KHIANGTE & UNCLE JOE
snippet.description:
Kan ṭhian pathuma kan hla pathumna kan ti puitling ve leh thei ta mai hi Pathian hruaina kan dawn nasat zia tichiangtu a ni a, Lalpa chungah hian kan van lawm tak êm..! He hla kaltlang hian Lalpa hming chu chawimawiin awm sela,
Lalpa’n he hla ngaithlatu zawng zawngte malsawm vek che u rawh se.

Audio - Mathana Efx
Video - M_space production
Composer - Jonathan Lianhna
Co-writer(rap verse) - Uncle Joe
2nd voice - Regina

If you love R Nait’s style, storytelling, and swag, this punjabi new song hits hard with its raw Punjabi feel and catchy beats 🔥 From bold lyrics to signature vocals, MIRZAPUR is another solid addition to the Punjabi music scene.

snippet.title: Mohini Ekadashi Brata Katha | ମୋହିନୀ ଏକାଦଶୀର ବ୍ରତ କଥା | Ekadashi Gahani | Sasmita Mishra
snippet.description:
ବୈଶାଖ ମାସ ଶୁକ୍ଳ ପକ୍ଷରେ ପଡୁଥିବା ପବିତ୍ର ମୋହିନୀ ଏକାଦଶୀର ଅପାର ମହିମା ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ। ଏହି ବ୍ରତ କଲେ ମନୁଷ୍ୟ ସମସ୍ତ ପାପରୁ ମୁକ୍ତି ପାଇଥାଏ। ଲୋକପ୍ରିୟ କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ସସ୍ମିତା ମିଶ୍ର (Sasmita Mishra) ଙ୍କ କଣ୍ଠରେ ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ ଏହି ବ୍ରତର ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣାଙ୍ଗ ଗIହIଣୀ ଓ କଥାବସ୍ତୁ..

ବୈଶାଖ ମାସ ଶୁକ୍ଳ ପକ୍ଷରେ ପଡୁଥିବା ପବିତ୍ର ମୋହିନୀ ଏକାଦଶୀର ଅପାର ମହିମା ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ। ଏହି ବ୍ରତ କଲେ ମନୁଷ୍ୟ ସମସ୍ତ ପାପରୁ ମୁକ୍ତି ପାଇଥାଏ। ଲୋକପ୍ରିୟ କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ସସ୍ମିତା ମିଶ୍ର (Sasmita Mishra) ଙ୍କ କଣ୍ଠରେ ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ ଏହି ବ୍ରତର ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣାଙ୍ଗ ଗIହIଣୀ ଓ କଥାବସ୍ତୁ..

#MohiniEkadashi #SidharthBhakti #SasmitaMishra #EkadashiBrataKatha  #OdiaDevotional #JayJagannath #JayJagannathTV #NamitaAgrawal #SitaramAgrawal #EkadashiGahani #OdishaTradition #LordVishnu #Bhakti #OdiaSpiritual

🎶 Bhajan Playlist Included:

Sanso Ki Mala Pe Simru

Adharam Madhuram

Radhe Tere Charno Ki

Achyutam Keshavam

Mere Sarkar Aaye Hai

Tera Kisne Kiya Singar Sanware

राधा नाम अनमोल बोलो राधे राधे,
राधा नाम का अर्थ क्या होता है,
राधा नाम अपार जपे जा राधे राधे,
राधा का नाम अनमोल भजन,
राधा नाम की अखं मस्ती,
राधा नाम आधार,
है राधा नाम आधार,
radha naam mahima,
रही है श्री राधा नाम की,

radha naam ki lagai,

श्री राधा राधा नाम,

राधे राधे नाम,

radha radha5 naam ho jaye,
radha naam ho jaaye,

snippet.title: Bholenath Stuti : आशुतोष शशांक शेखर | Mantra Ashutosh Shashank Shekhar | Shiva Mantra ~Powerful Song
snippet.description:
Bholenath Stuti : आशुतोष शशांक शेखर | Mantra Ashutosh Shashank Shekhar | Shiva Mantra ~Powerful Song

Song :- Ashutosh Shashank Shekhar
Singer :- Kamlesh Mishra, Deepak Rana
Lyrics :-  Traditional
Music :- Ankur Kapoor


🙏 **शिव स्तुति : आशुतोष शशांक शेखर | भोलेनाथ की दिव्य स्तुति** 🙏

यह अत्यंत पावन और मन को शांति देने वाली **शिव स्तुति "आशुतोष शशांक शेखर"** भगवान शिव की महिमा, करुणा और उनके दिव्य स्वरूप का सुंदर वर्णन करती है। इस स्तुति में भगवान भोलेनाथ को "आशुतोष" (जो तुरंत प्रसन्न हो जाते हैं) और "शशांक शेखर" (जिनके मस्तक पर चंद्रमा विराजमान है) के रूप में नमन किया गया है।

🕉️ **भगवान शिव** संपूर्ण सृष्टि के संहारक और पुनर्निर्माता हैं, जो अपने भक्तों के दुखों को हरकर उन्हें सुख और शांति प्रदान करते हैं।
🕉️ यह स्तुति भक्ति, श्रद्धा और आध्यात्मिक ऊर्जा से भरपूर है, जो हर भक्त के हृदय को शिवमय कर देती है।

✨ **इस स्तुति की विशेषताएं:**

* मधुर और शांतिदायक संगीत
* भगवान शिव के दिव्य रूप का सुंदर वर्णन
* मन को शांति और सकारात्मक ऊर्जा देने वाली रचना
* ध्यान और साधना के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त

📿 **कब सुनें यह शिव स्तुति?**

* सुबह की शुरुआत में भगवान शिव का आशीर्वाद पाने के लिए
* सोमवार के दिन विशेष रूप से
* ध्यान, पूजा और आराधना के समय
* तनाव और चिंता को दूर करने के लिए

🌙 **"हर हर महादेव" का जाप जीवन में सुख, शांति और समृद्धि लाता है।** 🌙

🔔 ऐसे ही और शिव भजन एवं स्तुति सुनने के लिए हमारे चैनल को **Subscribe** करें और Bell Icon जरूर दबाएं।

🙏 **हर हर महादेव! जय शिव शंकर!** 🙏

#ShivStuti #AshutoshShashankShekhar #Mahadev #Bholenath #ShivBhajan #DevotionalSongs #HarHarMahadev #ShivMantra #Bhakti
